panels.description: Medium shot of a tall, thin, pale man with a high nose, piercing burning eyes, and unnaturally white teeth. He is dressed entirely in black, wearing an odd, out-of-place straw hat. Cinematic noir lighting.

bubbles.text: He was a man of strange contrast; tall, pale, with eyes that burned like coals.

panels.description: The thin man stands at the shore end of a gang-plank leading to a cargo ship. He is talking to a gruff captain. The captain looks annoyed but intrigued by a purse of gold coins in the thin man's hand.

bubbles.text: I will pay well for a swift passage for my cargo to the Black Sea.
Keep your coin, stranger, and state your terms!

panels.description: The thin man drives a cart containing a heavy, ornate wooden crate onto the wharf. He is physically dragging the massive box toward the crane with surprising, supernatural strength.

bubbles.text: See it stowed exactly as I say. Do not touch the contents.

panels.description: Wide shot of the wharf and ship enveloped in a thick, unnatural, swirling white mist rising from the dark river. The tide is rising aggressively, creating a sense of impending doom.

bubbles.text: The mist crept up from the river, thick and suffocating, swallowing the ship whole.
